jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at EaseMyTrip
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, EaseMyTrip in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
